zh.lifeSummary: 當Sibylle de Barcelone於1035年出生在法國布格o-達姆a孔時，她的父親Bérenger-Raymond Ier de Barcelone35歲，母親Guisla de Lluçà comtessa consort de Barcelona24歲。她和Eudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogne至少有1個女兒。她去世於1102年3月23日在土耳其賓格爾亞易拉德塔盧享年67歲，埋葬在法國布格-福朗-可特艾度布斯貝桑c。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sibylle de Barcelone于1035年出生在法国布格o-達姆a孔时，她的父亲Bérenger-Raymond Ier de Barcelone35岁，母亲Guisla de Lluçà comtessa consort de Barcelona24岁。她和Eudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogne至少有1个女儿。她去世于1102年3月23日在土耳其賓格爾亞易拉德塔盧享年67岁，埋葬在法国布格-福朗-可特艾度布斯貝桑c。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Barcelone
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Alfredo, Amelita, Elvira, Jaime, Luis, Manuel, Mariano, Orlando, Ramon, Romelia.

Catalan and Spanish: habitational name from Barcelona, the principal city of Catalonia. The placename is of uncertain, certainly pre-Roman, origin. The settlement was established by the Carthaginians, and according to tradition it was named for the Carthaginian ruling house of Barca; the Latin form was Barcino or Barcilo.

variants.name: Barcelo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Luis, Carlos, Mario, Francisco, Juan, Ruben, Arturo, Eduardo, Humberto, Ignacio, Jaime.
Catalan (Barceló): apparently from the Latin personal name Barcelonus, a male equivalent of Barcelona, originally denoting someone from the city of Barcelona (see Barcelona ).

nameMeanings.name: Sibylle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Philippe, Alain, Etienne, Jean-Michael.
French: from the female personal name Sibille, from Greek Sibylla (see Sibley ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sibylle de Barcelone was born in 1035, in Mâcon, Côte-d'Or, Burgundy, France, her father, Bérenger-Raymond Ier de Barcelone, was 35 and her mother, Guisla de Lluçà comtessa consort de Barcelona, was 24. She had at least 1 daughter with Eudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogne. She died on 23 March 1102, in Taru, Yayladere, Bingöl, Türkiye, at the age of 67, and was buried in Besançon, Doubs, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sibylle de Barcelone est née en 1035, à Mâcon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, France, son père, Bérenger-Raymond Ier de Barcelone, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Guisla de Lluçà comtessa consort de Barcelona, avait 24 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Eudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogne. Elle est décédée le 23 mars 1102, à Taru, Yayladere, Bingöl, Turquie, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Besançon, Doubs, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sibylle de Barcelone 1035 in Mâcon, Côte-d'Or, Burgund, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Bérenger-Raymond Ier de Barcelone 35 und ihre Mutter Guisla de Lluçà comtessa consort de Barcelona 24. Sie hatte mit Eudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogne mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 23. März 1102 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Taru, Yayladere, Bingöl, Türkei und wurde in Besançon, Doubs, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sibylle de Barcelone è nata il nel 1035 nel Mâcon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, sua padre, Bérenger-Raymond Ier de Barcelone, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Guisla de Lluçà comtessa consort de Barcelona, aveva 24 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Eudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogne. Morì il 23 marzo 1102, nel Taru, Yayladere, Bingöl, Turchia, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Besançon, Doubs, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Sibylle de Barceloneが1035年にフランスボウルゴグンクoテ-ド'オルムaコンで生まれた時，父Bérenger-Raymond Ier de Barceloneは35歳，母Guisla de Lluçà comtessa consort de Barcelonaは24歳であった。彼女はEudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogneとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1102年3月23日にトルコビングoルヤイラデアターウで67歳で死去し，フランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeドウブズベサンcオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sibylle de Barcelone(이)가 1035년 프랑스 부르고그니 co테-드'어 a콘에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bérenger-Raymond Ier de Barcelone(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Guisla de Lluçà comtessa consort de Barcelona(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Eudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogne(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1102년 3월 23일 튀르키예 빙o 야이라더 터아루에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 다브스 베산c에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sibylle de Barcelone nasceu em 1035, em Mâcon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, França, seu pai, Bérenger-Raymond Ier de Barcelone, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Guisla de Lluçà comtessa consort de Barcelona, tinha 24 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Eudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogne. Ela faleceu em 23 de março de 1102, em Taru, Yayladere, Bingöl, Turquia, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Besançon, Doubs, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sibylle de Barcelone родилась в 1035 г. в местности мaкон, кoте-д'ор, бургогн, Франция, её отцу по имени Bérenger-Raymond Ier de Barcelone было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Guisla de Lluçà comtessa consort de Barcelona, 24. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Eudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogne. Она умерла 23 марта 1102 г. в местности тару, яиладир, бингoл, Турция в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности бесанcон, доубс, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sibylle de Barcelone nació en 1035, en Mâcon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, su papá, Bérenger-Raymond Ier de Barcelone, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Guisla de Lluçà comtessa consort de Barcelona, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Eudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogne. Murió el 23 de marzo de 1102, en Taru, Yayladere, Bingöl, Turquía, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Besançon, Doubs, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.
